q1_answer: The harder I pushed for control, the less I actually had.
q2_answer: I measured success by exhaustion and called it discipline.
q3_answer: Letting go of the plan was the moment the business finally grew.
q4_answer: Trust compounds faster than effort ever will.
q5_answer: I almost did not admit that I nearly shut the whole thing down last winter.
additional_info: Please keep the tone warm and direct.
